strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD/craftsmanship background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, DLang, C++) with MongoDB, Docker, and CI/CD experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotic arms era)
No mention of Vitest, Playwright, or cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role

response.justification: Candidate far exceeds the 6+ years requirement and demonstrates strong full-stack craftsmanship with the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a direct match for the role's AI agent requirement. Gaps in Nest.js and Vitest are easily bridgeable given the engineering depth, TDD focus, and architecture experience demonstrated across multiple senior roles.
